title: jasminoides afrum
intro: Jasminoides afrum, also known as Star Jasmine or Trachelospermum jasminoides, is a flowering evergreen vine native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and cardiovascular health benefits. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Jasminoides afrum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality.
